title: Pack Hash Manifest
description: Schema for pack_hash_manifest.json. Seals external ONNX model pack payload with SHA-256 hashes for integrity verification.

pack_dir.description: Absolute or relative path to the pack directory.

sealed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when hashes were computed.

models.description: Map of model filename to hash+size+shape. Keys are filenames within pack directory.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the model file.

input_shape.description: ONNX model input tensor shape (optional, for parity checks).

output_shape.description: ONNX model output tensor shape (optional, for parity checks).

model_lineage.description: Version strings from pack registry (clf_version, prm_version, etc.).
